error_map.hint: us-census api_key is missing or invalid; re-run pm credentials add us-census
us-census query_path does not match a published dataset endpoint
US Census Bureau API rate limit exceeded; the connector will retry with backoff

conformance.reason: StreamHook-handled (the real response is a top-level array-of-arrays -- header row of caller-driven field names, then data rows -- with no fixed records/schema shape to declaratively project); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/hooks/us-census/hooks_test.go. This stream's declarative path/records/schema fields are an inert shadow only exercised when Hooks is nil (never in production dispatch, which always routes through the StreamHook).
